title: Grabowski Task-Ledger-Worktree nach Ende der aktiven Repo-Lease archivieren und entfernen
goal: Archive and remove the exact clean Grabowski task-ledger convergence checkout after its foreign repository lease no longer protects live work, while preserving recovery refs and proving that no foreign checkout, branch, lease, runtime, deployment or remote ref was changed.

acceptance.assertion: Task metadata preserves live-register event 685, its candidate id, creation time and source.
Before any checkout mutation, the live repo:/home/alex/repos/grabowski lease is absent or expired; no foreign lease is force-released, shortened, transferred or bypassed.

The target checkout exists at /home/alex/repos/.grabowski-worktrees/task-ledger-convergence-v1, is clean, has branch fix/task-ledger-convergence-v1 and exact head 11104ac394fbc993b480aba41a601b18028ea2a4, and has no live task or process binding.
Grabowski checkout archival creates durable recovery refs bound to the exact head, branch, owner and retention deadline before deletion is considered.
Checkout cleanup is first evaluated as a dry run and the apply step is bound to the unchanged archive id, plan id, plan SHA-256, head, branch and clean-state evidence.
Post-state readback proves the linked checkout path and worktree registration are absent while the canonical checkout, all foreign worktrees, remote refs, runtime and deployment remain unchanged.
Promotion and cleanup do not mutate Bureau queue truth, verify unrelated tasks, grant claim authority or dispatch an agent.
